framework.name: Authorization gap in AIMS is structural, not incomplete
framework.description: The draft stops at token boundary for authorization. Per-action authorization is entirely unaddressed. People are already reading this -00 draft as deployment guidance despite the gap. This means anyone deploying agent-to-agent delegation TODAY has no standard for the authorization side.
framework.raw_quote: people are already reading this as deployment guidance, and the gaps matter for anyone building agentic systems today

source.title: AI Agent Authentication Gets the Hard Part Right. Authorization Is Still ...
